CREATE TABLE test_table (A INT, B DOUBLE);
CREATE TABLE another_table (C INT, D DOUBLE);
SELECT argmin(A, B) FROM test_table JOIN another_table ON test_table.A = another_table.C;
CREATE TABLE nested_table (E INT, F DOUBLE);
SELECT argmin(a.A, a.B) FROM test_table a WHERE a.B IS NOT NULL AND a.A IN (SELECT E FROM nested_table WHERE F IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE complex_table (G INT, H DOUBLE);
SELECT argmin(test_table.A, test_table.B) FROM test_table CROSS JOIN complex_table ON test_table.A = complex_table.G;
SELECT argmin(test_table.A, B) FROM (SELECT A, B FROM test_table WHERE B > 10) AS filtered_table GROUP BY filtered_table.A;
CREATE TABLE join_table (I INT, J DOUBLE);
SELECT argmin(t.A, t.B) FROM (SELECT A, B FROM test_table UNION ALL SELECT I, J FROM join_table) AS t;
